stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
If an aircraft is descending with idle power set, and using pitch to control speed following the trajectory shown in the annex, how will MCRIT (Critical Mach Number) change between positions 3 and 4?

options.a: MCRIT will increase due to a decreasing angle of attack and changing trajectory.
options.b: MCRIT will decrease due to an increasing angle of attack and changing trajectory.
options.c: MCRIT will decrease due to an decreasing load factor.
options.d: MCRIT will increase due to a decreasing load factor.
